rationale.R1.5: Proposes a clear and coherent section reorganization with detailed rationale for each part.
rationale.R1.7: Audits citations thoroughly, identifying missing key works and suggesting specific references.
rationale.RX.1: Flags some uncertainties but does not consistently mark confidence for all recommendations.
